data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: WhatsApp employs a microservices architecture to enhance scalability and maintainability.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes lightweight, independently deployable services, connected via APIs.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Implements end-to-end encryption to secure messages.
data.technical_spec: Uses the Signal Protocol for encryption, making communication private.

data.title: Cross-Platform Messaging
data.description: Supports messaging across multiple platforms seamlessly.
data.technical_spec: Built using Electron for desktop and native tech stacks for mobile.

data.title: Scale-out Architecture
data.description: Designed to handle a massive scale of concurrent users seamlessly.
data.technical_spec: Employs load balancers and distributed databases.

data.title: Real-time Communication
data.technical_spec: UDP-based protocols for voice calls; WebRTC for video calls.
